name: Enemy of my Enemy
objective_notes: Gallente-side entry; report to Kori Latamaki in H-PA29. Interceptor mandatory — nullsec bubbles and hostiles en route.

name: Recruitment Drive
objective_notes: Guristas-side entry; report to Kori Latamaki in H-PA29. Interceptor mandatory — nullsec bubbles and hostiles en route.

name: Turning Coat
objective_notes: Caldari-side entry; report to Kori Latamaki in H-PA29. Interceptor mandatory — nullsec bubbles and hostiles en route.

name: Intelligence Mining
objective_notes: Destroy Industrial to auto-loot item; waves spawn on timer (~5 min) regardless of kills. -0.02% Caldari State standing.

name: Planning the Operation
objective_notes: Choose: 'Sabotage 101' (stealth/minefield route) or 'Brassy Faced Bastard' (direct combat). No lasting arc impact.

name: Sabotage 101
objective_notes: 44 proximity mines detonate at 7.5 km but damage at 7 km — approach slowly. Destroying mines costs -2.4% Caldari State standing.

name: Brassy Faced Bastard
objective_notes: Guards are friendly until you fire or approach — both groups must be cleared before acc-gate activates. Blueprint lootable before all enemies die.

name: Miscommunication
objective_notes: Requires Hacking III and a Data Analyzer (agent provides it — equip before undocking). Reinforcements spawn after successful hack.

name: Fuel Gauge
objective_notes: Destroy one fuel depot to cascade-kill all capital ships; ignore battleships. Destroying Stasis Towers costs -2.4% Caldari State standing.

name: Knockout Punch
objective_notes: Board the agent-provided shuttle (it will be destroyed); don't shoot guards. Carrier drops Caldari Navy Rear-Admiral Insignia I — bookmark wreck to retrieve.
recommended_ship: Board provided shuttle (your ship stays docked)

name: Culling the Weak
objective_notes: Choose: investigate Irichi (→ Threat Assessment path) or investigate Kori via Eroma Eralen (→ Smoke and Mirrors path). No lasting arc impact.

name: Dread Pirates
objective_notes: Place Dread Guristas Strike Force (1 m³) in cargo before undocking. Drop at HQ structure to spawn acc-gate; survive 3 min of reinforcement waves. -0.24% Caldari standing.

name: Rabbit Hole
objective_notes: Storage bunker drops two containers — only one holds the mission item. Destroy Point Defense Battery to drop forcefield. Each structure kill costs -0.24% Caldari standing.

name: Passing the Buck
objective_notes: Carry Lt. Kipo (from Rabbit Hole) in cargo. Drop at HQ to open acc-gate; then kill in order: Yari/Daito → Shukuro Buke → Kerai to reveal warehouse. Caldari Navy tags drop.

name: Smoke and Mirrors
objective_notes: Approach four warehouses sequentially; each spawns a Pithoriate cruiser — kill cruiser, frigates warp off. Destroy final warehouse to trigger Eroma Eralen meeting.

name: Foxfire
objective_notes: Destroy 11 sentry guns to uncloak acc-gate. Bunker drops two containers — only one has the item. Avoid Point Defense Batteries/Stasis Tower: each costs -2.4% Caldari standing.

name: Spy Games
objective_notes: Forcefield regens at 150 HP/s; blitz via Tractor Beam I + 25 km weapon to pull container out. Destroying bunker costs -2.4% Caldari standing.
recommended_ship: T1 Destroyer or Frigate + Tractor Beam I (forcefield blitz)
